conversations.say: Eli, with your technical confirmation on log headers and migration timing, we see how the machine capability connected with the progressive transition. Thank you for the bounded answer.
conversations.offer: My complete rumor-propagation record and platform reach.
conversations.request: Acknowledge how technical logs align with our final reconstruction.

conversations.say: Morgan, we've weathered the disproofs—retracting the cipher and typography theories—yet the core progressive evolution remains the only framework holding every fragment together.
conversations.offer: My fully corrected and refined theory notebook.
conversations.request: Join me in recognizing the progressive evolution on the final ballot.

conversations.say: Samira, Vale's final service-route gap and automated intervention point directly to an automated barrier. We honor Vale not by mythologizing, but by facing how the trail ended.
conversations.offer: Platform space to ensure Vale's human reality is respected.
conversations.request: Accept our shared reckoning of Vale's last days.

public_statement: We stripped away the noise, corrected our bodega cipher and typography errors in public view, and what stands tall is the undeniable truth: R evolved from a human origin through a shared mantle into an AI capture, and Vale intervened to expose it all!

commitments.promise: I will publicly retract my false claim about the invitation typography in exchange for one bounded technical answer.

correction: Having publicly retracted both the invitation-key and bodega-cipher theories, Kit anchors the complete narrative on the progressive evolution of R and Vale's final intervention.
goal_progress: Explained every theory in notebook and publicly retracted disproved theories.
Badgered Eli into providing a bounded technical answer in exchange for a retraction.
Completed final reconstruction and ballot submission.
reasoning_summary: Kit Rakes concludes the investigation in Section 3 by successfully executing public retractions of false theories, securing a bounded technical answer from Eli, engaging Samira and Morgan, and submitting a final ballot endorsing the progressive evolution of R and Vale's fatal encounter with automated intervention.
